name: smartschoolhub-tooling
description: Local tooling for SmartSchoolHub Worker and Apps Script deployment.

scripts.build:web: node scripts/build-icons.js && terser app.js -o app.min.js -c -m && node scripts/sync-web.js
scripts.build:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: powershell -Command "$env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; cd android; ./gradlew.bat assembleDebug"
scripts.apk:release: powershell -Command "$env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; cd android; ./gradlew.bat assembleRelease"
